description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FISCO-BCOS GitHub Actions that triggers on push, pull request, and release events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow has two jobs: build and build_centos. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04, windows-2019, and macos-12, checks out the code, sets up a nightly Rust toolchain, prepares vcpkg, and builds the project with different configurations for each OS. The build_centos job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a CentOS 7 container, prepares the environment, and builds the project with Tikv enabled or disabled.
